top_signals.title: Bejjani: UAE Holding Up Well During Regional Uncertainty
top_signals.summary:
The Middle East business community is navigating a period of unprecedented uncertainty, as the Iran conflict disrupts supply chains, travel and investment flows across the region. Alain Bejjani, Author of NEXT: Leading Through the New Realities & former CEO of Majid Al Futtaim spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa on how businesses are adapting in the current environment.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: MAIA: OMIFCO CEO: Operation Not Impacted by Hormuz Closure
top_signals.summary:
Oman India Fertiliser Company, has announced a landmark IPO on the Muscat stock exchange, as it looks to capitalize on soaring prices and growing investor interest in the sector. The listing comes at a time when disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz is reshaping global fertilizer markets and raising concerns about food security. Ahmed Said Al-Marhoubi, CEO of OMIFCO spoke to Bloomberg’s Abeer Abu Omar on Horizons Middle East and Africa about the timing of their listing.
 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon engineers in Seattle slam employer for building AI data centers while laying off 30,000 staffers
top_signals.summary: Amazon engineers called out their employer for conducting mass layoffs while it commits to spending $200 billion this year on AI infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Treasury secretary signals progress on Bitcoin reserve, CLARITY Act
top_signals.summary: Scott Bessent said that the Treasury Department was “proceeding with all deliberate speed” on President Donald Trump’s 2025 executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve and digital asset stockpile.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: The American Military’s Coming Marathon
top_signals.summary: The Pentagon needs both quantity and quality to win modern conflicts.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coinbase freezes $3M tied to Southeast Asia crypto fraud networks
top_signals.summary: Authorities around the world have been heavily targeting scam infrastructure this year, with joint actions involving the US, UAE, China, Austria and Albania.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Poised to Extend Decline as Equity Sentiment Sours
The Next Infrastructure Supercycle Could Be Worth $20 Trillion
top_signals.summary: Unprecedented heatwaves, violent storms, mega-cyclones, catastrophic floods, prolonged droughts and uncontrollable wildfires have all become commonplace, with extreme weather events increasing in both frequency and intensity thanks in large part to human-induced climate change. Global temperatures have continued to soar, with recent years continually ranking among the hottest on record. The consequences go far beyond the destruction of local ecosystems and damaging physical infrastructure, creating other new opportunities as investments shift along…

top_signals.title: Bitmine eyes dividend-paying preferred shares, echoing Strategy’s playbook
top_signals.summary: The move comes as Ether prices slumped to a 14-month low below $1,750 on Thursday.
